problem id: 6e838251
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  01111001 -> 11111110
  00011111 -> 00111111
  01100111 -> 11011111
  11100010 -> 11111101
  10001001 -> 00110011
  01110101 -> 11111111
  01000101 -> 10011011
  11101101 -> 11111011
  00100101 -> 01001011
  00000000 -> 00000000

query: 00110100
predicted answer: 01101101
